combined_text_for_llm: Create Your Own Success: A Day in the Life of a Salesperson "Create Your Own Success: A Day in the Life of a Salesperson By Melissa Suzuno, April 10, 2013Two-hour lunches and golf meetings sound great, but how much of your time do you actually get to spend on the fun stuff? Find out about the day-to-day life of a salesperson during our chat with Damien Swend
